calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2011 Continued To Aug-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Successor Trustee For Order Of Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Julie Nedwin.

The Petition for Instructions was taken under submission. The accounting petition was continued to July 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an amended or amendment to the accounting with notice to be filed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Continued To Jul-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Successor Trustee For Order Of Instructions
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Continued To Jun-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Continued To Jun-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Continued To May-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Successor Trustee For Order Of Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Continued To May-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Julie Nedwin.

Ms. Calhoun addressed the issue regarding why the accounting does not include the note and the deed of trust as assets on hand. The Court requested Ms. Calhoun file an amended account to include the above. The matter was continued to May 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Successor Trustee For Order Of Instructions
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Continued To Mar-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Julie Nedwin.

The matter was continued to March 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Calhoun to communicate with all Parties of the continuance date and that they should file their objections by March 16, 2011. If no objection is filed or no appearance is made on the next hearing date, the Court will consider granting all three forms of relief.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Successor Trustee For Order Of Instructions
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Continued To Feb-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Julie Nedwin.

Ms. Calhoun addressed the issue of venue, the day to day business of the Trust and the Deed of Trust. In addition, Ms. Calhoun presented a waiver of notice from Jordan (now 18), stated that Gillian, Zachary and Taylor were Minors, that notification went out to all of them and that the interest allocation is appropriate. Furthermore, Ms. Calhoun stated that everyone has received notice of the percentage allocation, that an accounting has been provided, that she had not received any notice of objection and requested a continuance to have the opportunity to provide more detail and explanation, and deal with the underlying issues raised by the Probate Examiner. The matter was continued to February 7, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
